commits_by_project: Current Works in GL — Core Monorepo

projects.name: THERMYNX — HVAC AI Operations Intelligence
projects.description: AI-powered HVAC analytics POC for the Unicharm facility — local LLM, RAG, work orders and analytics.
projects.role: Sole engineer — full-stack build: FastAPI backend, React/TypeScript frontend, Ollama integration, analytics engine.
highlights: RAG over facility docs, work-order workflow, analytics engine

projects.name: ClimaStream — Real-time HVAC Pipeline
projects.description: Production-grade streaming pipeline POC: Kafka -> TimescaleDB -> Airflow -> FastAPI -> Next.js.
projects.role: Sole engineer — designed and built the end-to-end microservice pipeline and simulator.
highlights: Microservices: simulator, ingestion, processor, ML, storage, API

projects.name: OMNYX — Universal IoT Operations Platform
projects.description: Next-gen production platform vision: Digital-Twin FDD, RL optimization, Agentic AI, dual-database architecture.
projects.role: Architecture & platform design — the strategic north star consolidating the POCs.

projects.name: GL Pulse — Platform Architecture
projects.description: Reference architecture & planning docs unifying ClimaStream, THERMYNX and OMNYX into one next-gen vision.
projects.role: Author — architecture documentation and lessons-learned consolidation.
highlights: Consolidates POC lessons into unified design

projects.name: GL PBS / BACnet Simulation
projects.description: BACnet device simulator workstream (simulator dashboard lives under Current Works in GL).
projects.role: Simulation flow study and BACnet device/UI analysis.

projects.name: Current Works in GL — Core Monorepo
projects.description: Active Graylinx monorepo: backend/frontend, commission tool, ML trainings, simulations, Kafka stress testing.
projects.role: Sole engineer — Kafka performance testing, cross-machine benchmarking, DB/ETL architecture audits.
highlights: DB & ETL critical-flaws audits, management summaries

projects.name: Graylinx Docs & PRD
projects.description: Product/architecture documentation: PRD, Modules & Features (175 features), Kafka/stress reports.
projects.role: Author/maintainer — PRD, feature inventory, architecture references.

projects.name: The SelfAware® Intelligence Suite
projects.description: Six-product local-AI suite (6 repos): Continuum (HVAC intelligence), AuditShield, Autonomous-Cortex, NeuralPulse, VisioScan, SpatialNexus.
projects.role: Designed & built the multi-product suite across six repositories.
highlights: SelfAware Continuum: Unicharm + Neo4j + pgvector + Ollama

projects.name: Concept Standard — Graph Analytics
projects.description: Interactive concept-map viewer (1,159 concepts, 5,985 relations) for lesson generation.
projects.role: Built the in-browser graph analytics tool (ECharts + Neo4j GDS).
highlights: Force/circular graphs, command palette, light/dark, a11y

projects.name: VOXARA AI — Voice Intelligence
projects.description: Realtime on-prem AI voice intelligence platform — monorepo with local LLM, Whisper STT, Piper TTS.

projects.name: TripTrail — Travel & Expense (RANGSONS)
projects.description: Buildless travel/expense reporting web app for RANGSONS LLP with HR approval + Google Sheets.
projects.role: Sole developer — static web app, Supabase backend, approval flow.

projects.name: Konva Canvas App
projects.description: React + TypeScript canvas/drawing app template (likely a UI/design component base).

projects.name: Nesso — Farm Traceability Platform
projects.description: Farm-to-fork traceability platform for NR Group (Nesso).
projects.role: Built the traceability web app — including a weekend build sprint (30–31 May).

projects.name: SelfAware Dev Stack
projects.description: Canonical local Docker dev stack (MySQL, PostgreSQL, Neo4j, Redis) for the SelfAware products.
projects.role: Authored the docker-compose environment for 4 products.

projects.name: MySQL Unicharm Proxy (deprecated)
projects.description: Docker MySQL port-forwarding helper — superseded by selfaware-dev-stack.

projects.name: Kimo SSH Keys
projects.description: SSH key storage / Graylinx laptop identity (kept out of git for security).

projects.name: Python ETL
projects.description: ETL / transformer-layer workstream (planning + follow-ups in May).
projects.role: ETL transformer-layer planning and conversion-workflow design.
